# BUG-NNN: [Short descriptive title]

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **ID** | BUG-NNN |
| **Author** | [Your name] |
| **Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Severity** | P0 / P1 / P2 / P3 |
| **Status** | Open / Investigating / Fixed / Won't Fix |
| **Component** | backend / frontend / infra |
| **Affects version** | e.g. `0.1.0` or commit hash |

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

- OS:
- Python version:
- Node version:
- Browser (if frontend):

## Root Cause (if known)

Analysis of why the bug occurs.

## Workaround (if any)

Temporary mitigation steps.

## Fix
